releases.title: Bug Fixes & Data Deletion Enhancement
highlights: Fixed transaction details display for goal-funded expenses with collapsible payment breakdown.
Enhanced 'Delete All Data' to properly clear all state including portfolios, market data, and refs.
Fixed goal payment source bug - goal funds now correctly deduct instead of contribute.
Improved stock news document titles with character limits and URL decoding.
Added conditional work time estimation display based on user settings.

releases.title: Transaction System Refinements
highlights: Improved spendFromGoal function for accurate goal-funded transaction tracking.
Enhanced transaction dialog with better payment method handling.
Fixed amount display in transaction details for non-cash payments.
General stability and TypeScript improvements.

releases.title: Major Feature Release - NEPSE Integration & Portfolio
highlights: Complete NEPSE integration with real-time stock market data.
Portfolio management with multiple portfolio support.
SIP plan automation and tracking.
MeroShare automation for IPO applications.
Stock detail modal with market analysis integration.
Enhanced security with encryption and session management.
PWA improvements with offline support and push notifications.

releases.title: MyWallet v2.0 - Complete Architecture Overhaul
highlights: Migrated to Next.js 16 with App Router.
Complete TypeScript strict mode implementation.
New component architecture with Radix UI primitives.
Enhanced data integrity with validation layers.
Improved state management with useWalletData hook.
New dashboard design with better UX flow.

releases.title: Goal & Debt Management Update
highlights: Added goal contribution tracking with visual progress.
Debt account management with payment scheduling.
Credit account tracking for credit cards.
Emergency fund tracking with quick actions.
Improved category statistics and breakdowns.

releases.title: Comprehensive Wealth Flow & Accurate Expense Tracking
highlights: Updated Balance Card to calculate expenses using total transaction amounts, including debt-funded purchases, for a more accurate financial overview.
Integrated Portfolio & IPO activity into daily summaries: Stock/Crypto buys and IPO applications are now factored into total expenses.
Included debt repayments in the global expense calculations for a complete picture of wealth flow.
Optimized Balance Card performance with improved memoization and explicit TypeScript safety.

releases.title: Major UX, Scanner, and PWA Update
highlights: Introduced native modal support for smoother in-app flows.
Redesigned receipt and QR scanner flows with better mobile-first UI and clearer actions.
Added richer scan history UX with improved filtering, exports, and visual states.
Delivered broad UI enhancements across dashboard, container layouts, and settings navigation.
Added payment method integration for faster transactions.
Upgraded PWA metadata and manifest icons (192/512/maskable and Apple icon) for better install experience.
Added a dedicated Release Notes page and linked it from About settings.
Shipped additional quality, stability, and performance improvements.

releases.title: Stability and Performance Improvements
highlights: Improved offline behavior and service worker reliability.
Polished core dashboard interactions.
Fixed minor bugs across settings and transaction flows.

releases.title: Feature Expansion Release
highlights: Expanded wallet management capabilities.
Improved responsiveness and overall app polish.
General stability improvements across modules.

releases.title: Core UX Refinement
highlights: Improved primary flows for daily use.
Refined key screens and interactions.
Applied reliability and quality fixes.

releases.title: Early Improvements Patch
highlights: Patched initial release bugs and edge cases.
Improved onboarding and data handling basics.
Minor UI and performance improvements.

releases.title: Initial Public Release
highlights: Launched MyWallet with core personal finance tracking.
Introduced transactions, categories, and dashboard foundations.
Delivered first stable web app experience.
